latin: Opus cras mane tradendum erat. typographum rogavi ut imprimeret. 'charta deest,' dixit machina. chartam addidi. 'atramentum deest.' atramentum mutavi. 'error ignotus.' typographum per fenestram paene proieci.

questions.prompt: What errors does the printer give?
questions.target: No paper, no ink, then an unknown error
choices: No paper, no ink, then an unknown error
It simply refuses to turn on

translation: The assignment had to be handed in tomorrow morning. I asked the printer to print. 'Paper is missing,' said the machine. I added paper. 'Ink is missing.' I changed the ink. 'Unknown error.' I nearly threw the printer through the window.
